cities.name: Tbilisi
cities.notes: Old Town sulfur baths, Narikala fortress, natural wine and bridge of peace

cities.name: Batumi
cities.notes: Black Sea promenade, Alphabet Tower, botanical garden and beach clubs

cities.name: Kazbegi
cities.notes: Dramatic Gergeti Trinity Church above clouds with Caucasus peak backdrop

cities.name: Kutaisi
cities.notes: Gelati monastery UNESCO site, Prometheus stalactite cave and Okatse canyon

cities.name: Sighnaghi
cities.notes: Walled town in Kakheti wine country with Alazani Valley views

itinerary.sim: Magti (best coverage) or Silknet — buy at Tbilisi airport arrivals or city shops
apps: Yandex Maps (better local transit + marshrutka guidance)

Tbilisi.name: Tbilisi
Tbilisi.note: Best first base for transit, cash exchange, museums, and the Mtskheta side trip.

days.theme: Old Town, Sulphur Baths & Riverfront Icons

activities.name: Narikala Fortress and Old Town walk through Kala district for classic balcony-house views
Abanotubani sulphur baths session on Bath Street
activities.cost: ₹300–₹6,000 depending on public vs private bath
activities.tip: Book a private room in the evening if you want a cleaner, quieter soak.

activities.name: Metekhi Church and Anchiskhati Basilica walk
Peace Bridge and Rike Park at dusk
Fabrika courtyard for cafés, bars, and people-watching

meals: Racha Restaurant — pkhali, lobio, khachapuri · ₹300–₹750 pp
Family Kitchen — canteen-style Georgian plates with veg choices · ₹240–₹600 pp
Kiwi Vegan Café — fully vegan, great for a lighter dinner · ₹120–₹210 pp

activities.name: Simon Janashia Museum of Georgia including the Museum of Soviet Occupation
National Gallery on Rustaveli Avenue
Rustaveli Avenue architectural stroll past the Opera House and Parliament
Mtatsminda funicular for panoramic city views
Dry Bridge flea market for Soviet antiques and local crafts

meals: Cafe Gabriadze — artsy Georgian bistro near the puppet theatre · ₹600–₹1,500 pp
Ninia's Garden — strong vegetarian Georgian spread · ₹750–₹1,350 pp
Cafe Leila — vegan-friendly stop in the old center · ₹300–₹360 pp

days.theme: Mtskheta UNESCO Day Trip + Tbilisi Market Evening

activities.name: Marshrutka from Didube to Mtskheta and back
Svetitskhoveli Cathedral, Georgia’s former royal-spiritual center
Jvari Monastery cliff-top lookout over the Aragvi–Mtkvari confluence
Samtavro Monastery and Bebris Tsikhe fortress ruins
Back in Tbilisi for Dezerter Bazaar snacks and wine shopping

meals: Cafe Guga, Mtskheta — homestyle Georgian lunch · ₹300–₹600 pp
Salobie, near Mtskheta — famous bean dishes and breads · ₹300–₹600 pp
Churchkhela + market snack crawl at Dezerter Bazaar · ₹30–₹180 pp

Sighnaghi.name: Sighnaghi
Sighnaghi.note: Compact Kakheti wine-country stop with valley views, town walls, and easy monastery access.

days.theme: Kakheti Views, Old Town Walls & Wine Country Slow Travel

activities.name: Tbilisi to Sighnaghi marshrutka or shared taxi via Kakheti
Sighnaghi old town wall walk and Alazani Valley viewpoints
Bodbe Monastery visit just outside town
activities.cost: Free; ₹150–₹300 taxi if you do not walk

activities.name: Pheasant’s Tears wine cellar or tasting room experience
Evening café-hopping around the main square and pastel lanes

meals: Pheasant’s Tears — traditional Kakheti menu with seasonal veg dishes · ₹600–₹1,500 pp
The Terrace Signagi — hill-view restaurant with mushroom, eggplant, and bread dishes · ₹450–₹1,200 pp
OKRO'S Wine Restaurant — salads, breads, local cheese, and wine flights · ₹450–₹1,200 pp

Kazbegi.name: Kazbegi
Kazbegi.note: Bring cash before arrival — coverage and ATMs are limited once you reach the valley.

days.theme: Georgian Military Highway Arrival & Gergeti Views

activities.name: Tbilisi or Kakheti transit to Stepantsminda via shared transfer / marshrutka
Walk or taxi up to Gergeti Trinity Church
activities.cost: Free hike or ₹1,200 return by taxi

activities.name: Town square and Terek River evening walk
Optional stop at Ananuri or the Friendship Monument on the way

meals: Cozy Corner — vegetable BBQ skewers and simple Georgian plates · ₹300–₹750 pp
Lunch at Maia — home-style daily menu, easy for vegetarians · ₹330–₹400 pp
Guesthouse supra dinner — home-cooked beans, salads, bread, and mains · ₹600–₹900 pp

days.theme: Full Mountain Day in the Caucasus

activities.name: Gergeti Glacier hike or longer valley trail beyond the church
Half-day meadow and mountain-photography walk around Stepantsminda
Optional 4x4 or taxi assistance for higher viewpoints
Sunset return to town for a slow dinner with Mount Kazbek views

meals: Rooms Hotel Kazbegi restaurant — best splurge view meal in town · ₹1,200–₹2,400 pp
Shorena's Bar — relaxed local plates and drinks · ₹450–₹900 pp
Guesthouse breakfast spread before hiking · usually included

Kutaisi.name: Kutaisi
Kutaisi.note: Good western-Georgia stop for UNESCO monasteries, river walks, and a lower-cost city break.

days.theme: UNESCO Monasteries, River Bridges & Old Kutaisi

activities.name: Bagrati Cathedral hilltop walk for city views
Gelati Monastery excursion by bus or taxi
Motsameta Monastery gorge stop
Sataplia Nature Reserve with cave and dinosaur footprints
White Bridge and Central Garden evening stroll

meals: Kartuli — authentic Georgian home-style cooking · ₹450–₹900 pp
Tea House Foe-Foe — soups, salads, and café bites · ₹150–₹450 pp
Palaty — polished Georgian dinner with wine list · ₹600–₹1,500 pp

Batumi.name: Batumi
Batumi.note: Use Batumi to slow down at the end of the trip — beach, boulevard, cable car, and botanical garden.

days.theme: Boulevard Arrival, Old Town Squares & Night Lights

activities.name: Kutaisi to Batumi marshrutka or train transfer
Batumi Boulevard and beach promenade walk
Piazza Square, Medea Statue, and old town lanes
Dancing Fountains night show
Optional panoramic wheel near the port

meals: Kozlovichi — homemade Georgian food and beer · ₹450–₹900 pp
Maspindzeli — Adjarian classics incl. bean dishes · ₹600–₹1,200 pp
Lobiani from street bakeries — cheap vegan snack fix · ₹36–₹45 each

days.theme: Botanical Garden, Cable Car & Batumi Panorama

activities.name: Batumi Botanical Garden cliff-side trails over the Black Sea
Argo Cable Car for the best full-city panorama
Adjara Art Museum
Adjarian khachapuri tasting session
Sunset return to the seafront for final promenade time

meals: Heart of Batumi — cozy, reliable Georgian dinner stop · ₹600–₹1,350 pp
Old Boulevard — seaside meal with broader menu choice · ₹750–₹1,800 pp
Coffee + dessert break on Rustaveli / Gorgasali streets · ₹180–₹450 pp

connections.method: Marshrutka or shared taxi via Kakheti (about 2 hrs)
Shared taxi or marshrutka back to Samgori / Isani
Didube marshrutka or shared taxi via the Georgian Military Highway (2.75–3 hrs)
Private transfer or return to Tbilisi and continue north by marshrutka (5.5–7 hrs total)
Marshrutka back to Tbilisi + onward marshrutka or train to Kutaisi
Direct marshrutka from Didube or train to Rioni/Kutaisi
Shared transfer via Tbilisi or private cross-country taxi
Marshrutka from Kutaisi central station or train toward the coast (2–2.5 hrs)
Fast day train (about 5 hrs) or longer marshrutka
Return to Tbilisi first, then connect by train or marshrutka to Batumi
Fast train back to the capital

extras: Telavi and Kakheti winery day trip
Longer Gergeti Glacier hike from Kazbegi

Tbilisi: Old Tbilisi balcony houses Kura River
